mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bracket_tournament WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY group_number ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bracket_tournament (tournament_id, group_number, group_name, rank_from, rank_to) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{groupNumber}, #{groupName}, #{rankFrom}, #{rankTo})

INSERT INTO bracket_match (bracket_tournament_id, round_number, match_number, player1_entry_id, player2_entry_id, winner_entry_id, is_bye) VALUES (#{bracketTournamentId}, #{roundNumber}, #{matchNumber}, #{player1EntryId}, #{player2EntryId}, #{winnerEntryId}, #{isBye})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, ew.player_name AS winner_name FROM bracket_match m LEFT JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN entry ew ON m.winner_entry_id = ew.id WHERE m.bracket_tournament_id = #{bracketTournamentId} ORDER BY m.round_number ASC, m.match_number ASC

SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, ew.player_name AS winner_name FROM bracket_match m LEFT JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN entry ew ON m.winner_entry_id = ew.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bracket_match WHERE bracket_tournament_id IN (SELECT id FROM bracket_tournament WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId})
